creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 192895
py-pkginfo-1.4.2.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that updates py-pkginfo to 1.4.2.

Changes by upstream:
- Use relative imports in pkginfo modules. Supports vendoring of the package into setuptools.
- Add support for Provides-Extra and Description-Content-Type fields. See: PEP 566.
- Remove support for old setuptools leaving PKG-INFO in the root of the project directory.

Changes to the port:
- Add LICENSE_FILE
- Add DOCS option with appropriate install target


QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK
